title: dioscorea sanpaulensis
intro: Dioscorea sanpaulensis, also known as the Brazilian wild yam, is a type of edible tuberous root native to the tropical forests of Brazil. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidant properties, which have been shown to have medicinal benefits. The health benefits of Dioscorea sanpaulensis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Dioscorea sanpaulensis can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, or used fresh in teas and infusions.
